Hey guys, is there a way to check WoDs stat difference after multiple copies? do the first 3 extra copies give more stats?
You can use this website to see how much stack increase after E3-ing a WoD.
https://www.kaiden.gg/morimens/wheels/

embeds.title: Morimens Wheels
embeds.description: Here is a list of wheels from the Morimens game

content: The Enlightenments on a WoD don’t change the Main Stat, but upgrades the Passive Stats.
Further dupes after E3 are ONLY Main Stat increases
dupes rarely matter for wheels, except once you get it to +12, it lets you use that 5 star with another 5 star on the same character if you wish to
oo cool site I get it now ty ty
what is sigil yield?
Money you get after fights, that you spend on Shops. That currency is called “Black Sigils” and “Sigil Yield” means more “Black Sigils”.
oh.. for some reason I only remember it as "Black something" lawl
Mhm~

It could be considered “Rewinding Time” because of Rouse, but *eh*
Timeworn Ramona can just run Keyflare WoDs, that’s most important
soo keyflare for the supports and Blade of Titan for the DPS?
Kinda…?

Crit Dmg/Crit Rate is for standard DPS. There will be cases where a DPS wants other Stats due to their Passives, such as Castor wanting Dmg Amp. Same goes for Supports that most supports want Keyflare/Aliemus Gen/Death Res/Sigil Yield/Dmg Amp. However, Faint wants specifically Death Res, and Ryker kind of wants Crit Rate due to their passives. 

Realm Mastery is kind of a dead stat…
Dmp Amp/Sigil Yield/Death Res/RM are all team wide.

You will want E3 Kath to make her “playable” as in smooth playstyle and scaling. E2 Daff(Wants OE in endgame) for her to actually Crit and do Dmg/Generate a ton of Temp Counter. The reason why I said OE Tinct and OE Karen is because these supports will have uses with your Limited DPS Awakeners, where OE Sanga and OE Uvhash will steal your Limited Support Awakeners from your DPS. Just found out about this game and it seems right up my alley. Any good content for a beginner to watch before i jump in? (Beginners guides, tips, etc.)

nope, start the game and just dives in, play til you unlock pulling, the tutorial x5 pulls let u reset the SSR you get, do it til you get Jenkins, Winkle, or Nautila, or just a character you think is cool, it doesn't matter you get 3 standard ssr selectors just for logging in, but just for efficiency sake, spend standard pulls only on water banner (good units, and these units want dupe, also water is just a good element for new game (first 9 chapters))

community tier list.. but again, this is based on end-game contents, you can just skip this and use who you like (as long as you assemble a working team and not run, say 1 support 3 dps) https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?gid=525060342#gid=525060342

embeds.title: Flares' Holy Spreadsheet  to Morimens V4.0 Gmurphy

content: Thats really good to know, thanks!
as for limited pulls.. currently tawil is a solid pick, she's good at E1 and you want her at E2, or go for Kath, Kath NEEDS E3 but she carries the team
Flares' spreadsheet is also filled with biases and misinformation, so please don't treat it as a bible <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
can you point out the wrong parts
I was hearing about the different realms? And whatever so ultimately do i just wanna pick a color and go for that?
you wanna go 1 element or mix with yellow, these elements when by themselves work normally, but paired with another element they get a debuff, but you get 2 mechanics to play with
except when you pair with yellow, yellow give little to no negatives for mixing elements as far as I know
after you do the tutorial pulls you can access trial stage for banner characters and standard characters, just try these stages you'll understand

You do not have to pull Aequor, them being better in early game doesn't matter, since you can clear it with literally anything
So just pick the realm you actually want to invest into

Greed is a pretty meh option as far as R wheels go

Tier lists are not a good reference for team building in general, but his list also puts one of the best supports in the game into F tier based on his own dislike of her

Yeh, Aurora does A5 with her
Also his GHelot run with Helot
Oh, those are some useful screenshots, thanks! What is Helot's role in the game though?...
buffer
her ult is a final damage multiplier to strike damage
ghelot's main nuke skill is considered a strike
so helot ult directly doubles her damage
same reason she's used in the faint w3 cheese comp, since that comp uses faint strike damage to stack temp counter

realistically she's the you pass butter robot meme but you buff strikes instead

depends on where you're at, like normal story can make do with e0 but you really want e3 for harder content and endgame solo carry a5 is going to want oe

content: The monthly pass is 100% the best thing to get since you get the bp wheels

I think f2p income is around 70 limited pulls a month, 1 universal limited character duplicate, and 1 universal limited wheel duplicate. You also get a whole bunch of standard pulls.

Anni and half anni will also provide more on top of that.

around 70 pulls per month (30 standard 40 limited), not including events

PVP is only about unlocked vs not unlocked. 

Not P2W...
And even that doesn't matter in draft

The pvp in this game doesn't take into account character dupes or wheel dupes and generally puts people on even footing. There is also a draft mode that unlocks everything for both players. Most people here complain about pvp because they don't enjoy it, rather than it being p2w.
